A Service by HS108

WebCanvas

Digital
Design

Web App UI UX

Intuitive digital experiences that captivate audiences and perform at every touchpoint. From the first wireframe to the final pixel.

Timeline 4–16 weeks depending on scope
Output Production-ready Figma files

What We Do

Design for screens
people actually use.

WebCanvas is how HS108 approaches digital. It covers the full range — from the marketing site that converts visitors into believers, to the product interface that earns daily use.

We don't design for Dribbble. We design for the person who lands on your page, clicks through your app, and decides whether to trust your product. That means research before execution, structure before aesthetics, and accessibility baked in from the start.

Every WebCanvas project is grounded in how people actually behave — not how we hope they will.

Deliverables

Web Design

  • Marketing sites & landing pages
  • Product & SaaS web interfaces
  • CMS-ready design (Webflow, Framer, custom)
  • Responsive design across all breakpoints
  • Launch QA and developer handoff

App & Product UI

  • iOS & Android app UI design
  • Dashboard & data visualisation
  • Component-level UI systems
  • Interaction & micro-animation specs
  • Design tokens for engineering

UX

  • User research & interviews
  • User journey mapping
  • Information architecture
  • Wireframes & low-fidelity concepts
  • High-fidelity prototypes (Figma)

How We Work

01

Research

User interviews, competitor analysis, and content audit before any screen is designed.

02

Architecture

Site map, information hierarchy, and wireframe flows aligned to user goals.

03

Design

Full high-fidelity UI — every page, every state, every breakpoint.

04

Handoff

Figma files structured for engineering. Dev tokens, annotations, and QA support.

Start a WebCanvas project.

Tell us what you're building — a new site, an app redesign, or a product that doesn't exist yet. We'll scope it together.

Get In Touch ← All Services

WebCanvas at a Glance

4–16 Weeks typical engagement
100% Figma — no black box tools

Need more than digital?

WebCanvas is one of four HS108 practices. Explore branding, product design, and visual production.
